_comment: Ready-to-adapt Vapi assistant config for LALUM. Replace the placeholders in ANGLE BRACKETS. Paste the full text of lalum_voice_agent.he.md as the system message content. Pick a Hebrew-capable voice and transcriber (test the Hebrew quality first).
